dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
dialogue_segments.text: They want you afraid. Fear makes you easier to control.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
dialogue_segments.text: It's time to wake up.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 1
dialogue_segments.text: Your streets shall once again run red with your blood.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: Raul Menendez, United Global Unrest.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Raul Menendez
dialogue_segments.text: on an unprecedented scale.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: Menendez is a terrorist.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Raul Menendez
dialogue_segments.text: We're bringing peace and security to the world.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: He refuses to let me go.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Raul Menendez
dialogue_segments.text: Stop looking backwards, David. What matters is what we do next.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Speaker 2
dialogue_segments.text: A lot of people counting on us for answers.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Raul Menendez
dialogue_segments.text: You have no idea what you've done.

dialogue_segments.speaker: David
dialogue_segments.text: I know exactly what I've done, Menendez.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Raul Menendez
dialogue_segments.text: This is just the beginning of your suffering.

dialogue_segments.speaker: David
dialogue_segments.text: Specter One, report!

dialogue_segments.speaker: David
dialogue_segments.text: Need a sitrep!

dialogue_segments.speaker: David
dialogue_segments.text: This isn't real.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Raul Menendez
dialogue_segments.text: The hell it ain't!

dialogue_segments.speaker: David
dialogue_segments.text: Pull it together, man!

dialogue_segments.speaker: Menendez
dialogue_segments.text: So eager to leave, David.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Menendez
dialogue_segments.text: Killing the man is a hell of a lot easier than killing the idea.

dialogue_segments.speaker: David
dialogue_segments.text: You were never cut out to be a Mason.

dialogue_segments.speaker: David
dialogue_segments.text: No more games. This ends now.

dialogue_segments.speaker: Announcer
dialogue_segments.text: Get the Reznov challenge pack when you pre-order now.

segments.description: Dramatic, cinematic trailer music featuring intense percussion and synth swells, underscored by movie dialogue.
High-intensity movie trailer featuring dramatic cinematic music, sound effects, and dialogue.
High-intensity, dramatic action movie trailer music with heavy percussion, orchestral swells, and sound effects like explosions.
High-intensity action movie trailer music with dramatic orchestral swells, heavy percussion, and sound effects like explosions and gunshots, interspersed with intense dialogue.
High-intensity, dramatic action music featuring a voiceover promoting a pre-order offer, accompanied by cinematic sound effects like whooshes.

musicData.summary: The audio continues as a high-intensity movie trailer with dramatic music, sound effects, and voiceover, maintaining a high level of excitement.

chunks.summary: Chaotic glitchy intro with 'RISING TENSIONS' text triggers immediate skepticism, but fast cuts and intense music maintain sensory engagement.

patience.reasoning: Direct hit on pet peeve ('Rising tensions' text) drastically reduces willingness to wait; thumb hovering over scroll.

boredom.reasoning: Visually busy but feels generic/cliché; 'seen this before' fatigue sets in despite the chaos.

excitement.reasoning: High-intensity music and rapid visual transitions provide sensory punch, preventing immediate scroll despite skepticism.

chunks.summary: Fast-paced destruction and glitch effects keep the energy high, but the 'wake up' voiceover feels like a generic trailer cliché that risks breaking immersion.

patience.reasoning: Fast cuts and high stakes keep me from scrolling, but the generic military vibe is testing my tolerance for clichés.

boredom.reasoning: Too much visual chaos and movement to zone out; the car crash shot specifically grabs attention.

excitement.reasoning: The cinematic scale and glitch effects hit the dopamine need, even if the 'wake up' line is cringe.

chunks.summary: The title card slams in immediately which hooks me, but the edgy villain dialogue is kinda cringe.

patience.reasoning: Title card hits within the first second of the chunk, buying me a few more seconds despite the cliché dialogue.

boredom.reasoning: Too much visual chaos with fire and glitches to zone out, even if the script is generic.

excitement.reasoning: Black Ops 7 logo reveal plus high-intensity music and explosions spikes the hype significantly.
